name: KODEKS Operator Model Adapters

policy.core_rule: KODEKS core is local. AI providers are replaceable adapters.

local_ollama.role: Primary local model runtime when available.
local_ollama.data_policy: Keep prompts and local file context on Dawid PC unless Dawid explicitly chooses otherwise.

codex_session.role: Live work channel for this session.
codex_session.truth_boundary: This channel may depend on OpenAI infrastructure. It is not the long-term locked core of KODEKS.

external_api.role: Fallback or specialist model only when Dawid explicitly enables it.
external_api.data_policy: Never send private local files, secrets, tokens or sensitive context without explicit permission.

routing_rules: Use local tools, scripts and file checks for PC health before asking an AI provider.
Prefer local_ollama for offline/local model work when it is running and has usable models.
Use codex_session for live operator work while Dawid is in this Codex thread.
Use external_api only if Dawid explicitly asks for it or approves the route.
If no model is available, continue with deterministic scripts, audits and local reports.
next_build_steps: Detect installed Ollama models. DONE: scripts/kodeks_local_chat.py --health
Choose a default local model for KODEKS. DONE: llama3.2:1b fast, llama3.2:3b smart
Create a local prompt wrapper that loads the KODEKS manifest. DONE: scripts/kodeks_local_chat.py
Create a small local chat endpoint or CLI for provider-neutral operation.
Add health checks for model runtime and adapter status.
